divergent_child.mechanism: Use cross-sectional dispersion compression after realized-volatility shocks rather than convexity/VIXY stress exposure.
divergent_child.title: Options-free ETF crash-recovery dispersion allocator

bad_result_policy.note: If rejected, no refinement/extension/direct continuation is suggested.

costs_slippage.handling: Post-cost proxy subtracts 5 bps times estimated one-way daily target-weight turnover.

data_source: Alpaca real OHLCV via qfa/AlpacaGateway; --data-csv not used

db_used.retention_note: Temporary SQLite DBs deleted after qfa JSON capture.

decision_rationale: Falsified: high redundancy max abs corr 0.8774.

orthogonality.method: Pearson daily equity-return correlation vs retained latest.json curves where available

warnings: Native qfa metrics are pre-cost; post-cost results are proxy estimates.
VIXY availability begins after inception; windows were selected after sufficient history.
Long-only defensive allocator may lag sudden recoveries and can hold decaying VIX futures ETF exposure during false stress signals.
